name: Banana-Coconut Rolls
recipeIngredient: 2 Tablespoons lemon juice or lime juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Buy green-tipped or all yellow bananas.
2. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
3. Grease a 10-inch x 6-inch x 2-inch baking dish.
4. Cut the bananas into halves, crosswise; place in the dish.
5. Brush well with butter, then lemon juice; sprinkle with coconut.
6. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes, or until easily pierced with a fork.
7. Serve warm, with cream or orange sauce. Makes 4 servings.
